notes: BMI computed from height/weight with the script's sentinel-value convention (999/99/9999 for missing/unrealistic rather than deletion, per the script's own header note), motheragegp/bmigp categorical derivation, PROC TABULATE cross-tab by year (YEAR kept in the CLASS statement, matching the source script's own CLASS list at npdc clean.sas:305-306). Original cohort (private linkage data) substituted with a 10-row mock cohort covering zero-weight/zero-height edge cases. Thresholds and sentinel logic unchanged from source.
